name: Google Gemini Code Assist
description: Google AI coding assistant integrated with Cloud Code IDE plugins. Context-aware completions for GCP services, natural language code generation. Multi-language support with cloud-aware suggestions. Free tier available.
shortDesc: Google AI code assistant with GCP

name: Continue
description: Open-source AI code assistant for VS Code and JetBrains. Connects to any LLM, local or cloud. Code chat, inline editing, codebase context. Privacy-respecting with local model support. Highly customizable.

name: Blackbox AI
description: AI code assistant for VS Code focusing on code completion, chat, and search across real-world code. Free tier with unlimited completions. Integrates web search for code examples. Multi-language support.
shortDesc: Free AI code assistant with web search

name: Visla AI
description: AI video creation platform generating complete videos from text. Stock footage integration, auto voiceover, script writing, team collaboration. Creates marketing and explainer videos quickly.

name: MarketMuse
description: Enterprise AI content strategy and optimization platform. Topic modeling, content gap analysis, competitive benchmarking. Data-driven briefs for content teams. SEO-focused with comprehensive planning.

name: Boomy AI
description: AI music creation making original songs in seconds. Multiple genres including electronic, lo-fi, hip-hop. Upload to streaming platforms. Royalty-free music for creators. Very beginner-friendly.

name: OpenAI Jukebox
description: Open-source AI music generator creating raw audio with lyrics and melody across multiple genres. Neural network learns music patterns. For researchers exploring AI music generation.

name: Exa (Metaphor)
description: AI-powered search API for developers with semantic and neural search. Understands intent beyond keywords. Embeddings-based relevance. For building AI-powered search experiences. Developer-friendly.
